ksher-settlement._notes: Top-line transaction amount 5350.00 is the totalAmount. Commission 37.45, VAT on commission 2.62, WHT 1.12, net credit to merchant 5309.93 — these are derived, not headline total. Models returning 40.07 or 5309.93 as totalAmount are wrong per user.

fedex-invoice._notes: Subtotal = taxable portion only (1178.39). Non-VAT portion (20657.00) is the duties/taxes pass-through. Air Waybill 406229232391.

tiktok-invoice._notes: Vendor is Singapore-registered. 0993000455738 is Singapore GST — not Thai 13-digit format. Accept the value; models returning null score partial. Contract No: CON7547983927086492161. Five campaign line items totaling 7948.00.

expected.nameTh: น.ส. พิมพ์วิมล จิรไพศาล
expected.address: 82/341 ถ.กัลปพฤกษ์ แขวงบางแค เขตบางแค กรุงเทพมหานคร

influencer-id-card._notes: Date of Issue 2026-01-24 not in schema. Laser code 1040-06-01241325 not in schema.

rules.correct: Exact match (after string normalization: trim, collapse spaces, Thai digit → Arabic)
rules.partial: Semantically equivalent but formatted differently (e.g. '21,917.88' vs '21917.88', 'Federal Express' vs 'Federal Express (Thailand) Limited')
rules.missing: Field returned as null/undefined — penalized less than hallucination
rules.hallucinated: Field has a value but is factually wrong — worst outcome, especially for tax IDs / totals
